description_long: This object consists of multiple flat, rectangular panels arranged in a loosely circular, three-dimensional formation. Each panel displays a grayscale photographic image of clouds against a sky, giving the impression of floating or suspended elements. The panels vary in size, with some larger and more prominent, while others are smaller and positioned above the main group. The arrangement creates a sense of depth and spatial layering, as if the panels are hovering in midair. The surfaces of the panels appear smooth and matte, with sharp, clean edges. There are no visible structural supports, engines, or traditional airplane features such as wings, fuselage, or tail sections.
description: A collection of flat, cloud-printed panels arranged in a floating, circular formation, with varying sizes and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Several cloud-printed panels are visible, with the largest panels forming a partial ring and smaller panels floating above.
description_view_1: The circular arrangement of panels is more apparent, with the cloud images facing outward and the upper panels more visible.
description_view_2: The panels appear staggered, with the largest panel on the left and a clear view of the layered, floating arrangement.
description_view_3: The circular, floating configuration is prominent, with the panels' cloud images facing outward and the uppermost panels clearly visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No discernible wingspan or wing configuration present; object consists of flat panels with no aviation wing features.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines or propulsion systems present.
attribute_tail_design: No tail structure or stabilizer configuration present.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear or support structures visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No cockpit or crew compartment visible in the structure.
